genre_coordinate: K-pop ballad for rainy night driving; Japanese modern female jazz vocal character; non-jazz accompaniment; narrow arrangement dynamics and low vocal register

evidence.scope: Lee So-ra feat. SUGA — Song Request; Primary mood reference; radio-night verse build and minor-to-relative-major relief; selected for rainy-drive emotional center
IU — Through the Night; Intimate form reference; long verse and compact chorus with minor-subdominant color; selected for low-energy contrast
Taeyeon — Rain; Rain-memory structure reference; recurring build and late independent refrain; harmony adapted away from jazz accompaniment

evidence.track: How Can I Love the Heartbreak, You're the One I Love
evidence.scope: AKMU — How Can I Love the Heartbreak, You're the One I Love; Narrative form reference; verse-pre-chorus storytelling and extended coda; selected for acceptance arc and diatonic clarity

evidence.track: I Will Go to You Like the First Snow
evidence.scope: Ailee — I Will Go to You Like the First Snow; Dramatic K-ballad reference; direct chorus and late modulation; selected for a harmonic-color crest without jazz arranging
Davichi — This Love; OST build reference; repeated pre-chorus and delayed final arrival; selected for restrained dramatic pacing
IU — Lullaby; Lullaby form reference; delayed harmonic resolution and releasing coda; selected for the playlist's quietest interior point
Paul Kim — Every Day, Every Moment; Structure role only: two complete Verse-Pre-Chorus-Chorus cycles lead to a Bridge and final Chorus
Yoon Mirae — Always; Structure role only: direct Verse-Chorus cycles begin with the voice, followed by a Bridge and final Chorus; the Coda is an original addition
Crush — Beautiful; Hook-led OST reference; repeated compact hook before a final full chorus; selected as the playlist's dawn-facing resolution

Heize feat. Shin Yong Jae — You, Clouds, Rain; Harmony role for Track 8: slow minor-centered rhythm, major-seventh color, secondary-dominant pull, and a brief darkened subdominant; distilled without copying the source progression
Epik High feat. Younha — Umbrella; Emotional-arc role for Track 8: rain intensifies separation, recurring returns keep the absent bond present, and the ending accepts distance without severing care

Jonghyun — End of a Day; Harmony role for Track 9: a major center softens through relative-minor motion, borrowed minor-subdominant color, and direct cadential release; distilled without copying the source progression

Lee Hi — HOLO; Emotional-arc and secondary hook-model role for Track 9: loneliness among other people gives way to self-directed acceptance; only a compact title-centered return is distilled for catchiness, with no source melody, lyric, or image reused

permitted_combinations.recurrence: two full chorus returns followed by a lyrically varied final return
permitted_combinations.entry: felt piano | two-note gaps | vocal bar 5
permitted_combinations.groove_signature: quarters | bass pickup to beat 1 | rim alternate bars
permitted_combinations.contrast_peak: the bridge changes spectral color while the voice stays below D5 and the final return keeps the same narrow loudness ceiling
permitted_combinations.transition_interlude: each pre-chorus adds harmonic color while holding drum density, loudness, and the low vocal register steady
permitted_combinations.ending: four ambient instrumental bars dissolve the piano fragments into rain

permitted_combinations.recurrence: two compact chorus returns carry the same central confession
permitted_combinations.entry: nylon guitar | broken thirds | vocal bar 5
permitted_combinations.groove_signature: straight eighths | guitar on 2-and | kick every 2 bars
permitted_combinations.contrast_peak: the second chorus is the emotional ceiling rather than a large climax
permitted_combinations.transition_interlude: verse endings thin before each direct chorus arrival
permitted_combinations.ending: an eight-bar instrumental coda releases the suspended light

permitted_combinations.recurrence: two choruses lead to a separate late refrain
permitted_combinations.entry: low synth | single-note pulses | vocal bar 5
permitted_combinations.groove_signature: half notes | synth on beat 4 | full-bar drum gaps
permitted_combinations.contrast_peak: the standalone refrain becomes the peak after a drumless bridge
permitted_combinations.transition_interlude: pre-choruses tighten the pulse and lift the inner line
permitted_combinations.ending: a short pulse-and-piano outro closes the reflected image

permitted_combinations.recurrence: two chorus statements defer the final conclusion to the coda
permitted_combinations.entry: muted guitar | offbeat knocks | vocal bar 5
permitted_combinations.groove_signature: dotted eighths | guitar on 4-and | kick alternate bars
permitted_combinations.contrast_peak: the second chorus opens into the coda instead of another peak
permitted_combinations.transition_interlude: a four-bar instrumental break separates the two narrative halves
permitted_combinations.ending: the coda states the acceptance and resolves the deceptive motion

permitted_combinations.recurrence: two restrained choruses prepare one transposed final chorus
permitted_combinations.entry: guitar harmonics | alternating dyads | vocal bar 5
permitted_combinations.groove_signature: two-beat cycle | bass before beat 3 | drums at section turns
permitted_combinations.contrast_peak: the bridge changes harmonic color before a same-register final chorus under the same loudness ceiling
permitted_combinations.transition_interlude: a short instrumental break resets the dynamic floor
permitted_combinations.ending: four bars sustain the new key after the final lyric

permitted_combinations.recurrence: three chorus arrivals are each delayed by a pre-chorus
permitted_combinations.entry: mono bass | guitar-answer pedal | vocal bar 5
permitted_combinations.groove_signature: withheld downbeat | bass on beat 2 | tom every 4 bars
permitted_combinations.contrast_peak: the bridge darkens before a third pre-chorus withholds the final downbeat
permitted_combinations.transition_interlude: pre-choruses use dominant tension as the recurring hinge
permitted_combinations.ending: a short firm close follows the final confession

permitted_combinations.recurrence: two chorus returns expand into one longer final chorus
permitted_combinations.entry: reverse guitar | paired swells | vocal bar 5
permitted_combinations.groove_signature: even eighths | fourth-bar drop | kick on Chorus beat 1
permitted_combinations.contrast_peak: the bridge suspends the pulse rather than increasing loudness
permitted_combinations.transition_interlude: chromatic bass motion connects each verse to its chorus
permitted_combinations.ending: the coda resolves the open dominant and lets the city lights fade

permitted_combinations.recurrence: two complete verse-pre-chorus-chorus cycles lead to a bridge and expanded final return
permitted_combinations.entry: analog pad | guitar-answer chord | vocal bar 5
permitted_combinations.groove_signature: half-bar pulse | bass on 3-and | kick on first Chorus bars
permitted_combinations.contrast_peak: the bridge changes harmonic color while the exact title hook stays in the same low register and loudness ceiling
permitted_combinations.transition_interlude: both pre-choruses shorten the wording and hold density before the title hook
permitted_combinations.ending: four bars hold the unresolved minor-add-nine color after the promise

permitted_combinations.recurrence: three direct chorus returns arrive without pre-choruses
permitted_combinations.entry: lead voice | pad-unison onset | vocal bar 1
permitted_combinations.groove_signature: two-bar pulse | bass on beat 3 | kick alternate Chorus bars
permitted_combinations.contrast_peak: the bridge changes perspective before the final chorus repeats the same new five-note title motif in the low register
permitted_combinations.transition_interlude: short verse endings turn directly into the chorus downbeat
permitted_combinations.ending: a four-bar coda holds the borrowed minor-subdominant after self-acceptance

permitted_combinations.recurrence: two compact hooks prepare a single full final chorus
permitted_combinations.entry: FM bell | three-note sub-synth cell | vocal bar 5
permitted_combinations.groove_signature: 3+3+2 synth cell | bass across barline | kick at section turns
permitted_combinations.contrast_peak: the only full chorus is reserved for the ending after a darker bridge
permitted_combinations.transition_interlude: each short hook returns quickly to narrative motion
permitted_combinations.ending: four quiet bars turn the parallel-minor color back toward dawn
